svg.title: Flight controller block diagram: STM32 core with sensors on their buses, power input, and connectors
svg.desc: An STM32 microcontroller connects to an IMU over SPI, a barometer over I2C, a GPS and telemetry and RC over UART, with a power input stage providing regulated 3.3 volts.
svg.text: Each sensor sits on the bus suited to it: SPI fast for IMU, I2C for baro, UART for serial links
